scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB,WORKER -c green,blue,yellow "pnpm --filter @chainpulse/api dev" "pnpm --filter @chainpulse/web dev" "pnpm --filter @chainpulse/worker dev"
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm approve-builds && cd apps/api && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npx ts-node prisma/seed.ts && cd ../..
